title: RunEventDoc
description: Persisted event document in the run's append-only event log subcollection. Source of truth for run state via projection fold (see RunProjection). Generated from packages/workflow-engine/src/protocol/RunEvent.ts at WOP spec v1 baseline.

eventId.description: Globally unique ID for this event. Generated by appendAtomic before write; consumers MUST treat as opaque.

nodeId.description: Set for node-scoped events (node.*, approval.*, clarification.*). Lifted to top-level so projection code can key per-node state machines without payload type coercion.

payload.description: Event-type-specific payload. Servers MAY validate against per-type schemas; this top-level schema accepts any JSON value.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp. IO adapters normalize between this canonical form and platform-specific representations (e.g., Firestore Timestamp).

sequence.description: Monotonic per-run sequence. First event is 0; assigned atomically by appendAtomic.

schemaVersion.description: Per-event schema version. Bumped when an individual event type's payload contract changes. Distinct from per-run eventLogSchemaVersion (which describes the subcollection contract). Reader behavior is tolerant — unknown future versions fold best-effort.

engineVersion.description: Engine version that produced this event. Used by P4 versioning for compatibility checks.

causationId.description: Optional ID of the event that caused this one (e.g., node.completed caused by approval.received). Lets projections build causal chains without inferring from timing.

RunEventType.description: Discriminator for event payload shape. Dotted naming convention. New variants extend the union — readers MUST NOT throw on unknown types (forward-compat: fold best-effort, ignore unknowns).
